subject: docs: update README project structure for debug system files
body:
Add debugLog.js, copyToClipboard.js, DebugPill to the project structure
listing. Update index.html and main.jsx descriptions to reflect the
debug-root div and DebugPill mount. Add useScrollLock to hooks list.
